name: Kreativ Internal Links Audit
description: A full internal linking health audit to improve structure, crawl depth, and discoverability.
cardMeta: Audit internal linking quality across your site.
cardUse: Identify weak, missing, and unbalanced internal links to improve structure and crawlability.
metaDescription: Audit internal link quality, discover weak link patterns, and improve crawlability.

detailItems.title: Link distribution analysis
detailItems.body: Identify underlinked pages and excessive concentration around a small subset of URLs.

detailItems.title: Coverage and opportunity signals
detailItems.body: Surface link gaps where related pages should reference each other for better navigation and crawl paths.

detailItems.title: Actionable prioritization
detailItems.body: Highlight high-value fixes first so teams can improve structural quality with predictable effort.

ctaLines: Current status: In development. Release target: April 2026.
Follow our News page for release updates.
